base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stone_block_palette1 — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Solid stone-block tile — single indestructible cube used as ground support. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Solid stone-block tile — single indestructible cube used as ground support; same palette group as ground tile
